Knarthenne Skurl  

Monster
  • View
  • History
  • Media
  • Discuss
  • Tools
    • Main page
    • Print this page
    • What links here
    • Recent changes
    • Wiki search


Uploaded April 27th, 2014 by wiscookie
Updated January 28th, 2022

  • This mob spawns at -560, +330 by the river.
  • Class: Shadowknight
  • Findable (via Ctrl-F): No

Categories: Templatized | EverQuest | Shadowknight (EQ Mob Class)
This page last modified 2023-07-18 06:55:22.

Level: 50
Expansion:
NPC Added: 0000-00-00 00:00:00
NPC Last Updated: 2023-07-18 06:54:00
Items Given:
Soulcase

Known Habitats:
  Toxxulia Forest
Quests:
  Shadowknight Epic: Innoruuk's Curse

Report a correction

Post Comment
Location on THJ
QuoteReply
# Sep 23 2025 at 5:24 PM Rating: Decent
LegoDruid
2 posts
Toxxulia Forest -7, 1147
▲ Page top
Not Until Kunark on TLP
QuoteReply
# Jul 17 2023 at 10:40 PM Rating: Excellent
Venril
Guru
134 posts
Knarthenne is not available until Kunark is unlocked on progression servers. Confirmed today on Oakwynd.
▲ Page top
Spawn?
QuoteReply
# Sep 22 2006 at 1:47 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591863916538
3 posts
How can I get this guy to spawn? I have been camping him all day for 3 days now! Elial Brook is not PH as far as I can tell. Any Tips?
▲ Page top
Knarthenne Skurl
QuoteReply
# Aug 27 2006 at 3:10 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1716164195852
Scholar
80 posts
Killed Him a few minutes ago, soloed with 62 ranger. It was a good fight....
I had conviction and c3 on, the rest was jsut what I could put on myself. I did cheat once, I used a heal potion.

Highly magic resistive, snare never took, Earthcall proced about 10 times on him and never took. Has a high fire resist as well, Immolate and the Call of Fire proc never touched him. Only thing that took on him was Drifting Death and Drones of Doom, each resisted a few times but also took a few times. Oh, and my DS took on him and so did my weapons.

Faction hit there was none listed at the end. That doesn't necessarily mean that I didn't just mess up my True Spirit faction. My shammy never got a faction hit when my rain damage spell took out peg leg and immediately took out the lesser spirit in BB. Later when I tried starting my shammy's 1.0 the lesser spirit formt he same mob said something about seeing how much he could get for the tougn of a blithering fool when I hailed him. Fortunatly, the guy in RM that you smack down for the lesser spirit to pop, that one would talk to me....

I'ts been about 45 minutes since I started writing this (hey, been on my pally killing the guy at the dock for the faction for my pallys 1.0) and he's still not over there on his hill again. It's a shame, he ws fun, I wanted to dance with him again....the Dance of the Blades!!

*smiles*

thank you for your time;
cass
▲ Page top
ACURSED WRETCH and I'm an idiot...
QuoteReply
# Feb 17 2006 at 6:47 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591873453612
66 posts
I am a warrior of the 35th season. I conned his pet instead of him. I killed his pet when I was at 24% and RAN FOR MY LIFE. He killed me halfway to pok portal. He HTed me for 701 so wouldn't that make him level 70????? He hits in around 130 too.
▲ Page top
Knath loc
QuoteReply
# Jan 22 2005 at 2:09 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591789378003
7 posts
This guy popped in front of me after killing Elial Brook for the bones. Don't know if that helps but maybe Elial is PH. That is by the pier.

spawn
QuoteReply
# Feb 09 2004 at 12:58 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591777664192
12 posts
Ok I have been looking for this guy for like a few weeks now is he on a timer or does he spawn at certain parts of the day any info on spawn would be gratly appricated

Sir Zorb Shadowstalker
61 SK

Faction
QuoteReply
# Dec 22 2003 at 1:16 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757670846
1 post
I am a Lvl 56 SK working on my epic i have yet to see this guy pop...but thats my luck.. if he is part of the SK epic his faction should be with the truespirit.

Rumblerr
56 SK E-Marr
▲ Page top
ask him
QuoteReply
# Apr 01 2003 at 11:34 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591777529157
View User Forum
Scholar
45 posts
If you ask him 'what heart of an innocent' he gives you a "soulcase" and tells you to combine "with it the heart of one who is pure. If your hand is steady and your mind is clear, you shall have what you seek"
▲ Page top
Lot of HP
QuoteReply
# Jul 20 2002 at 4:15 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591776400696
View User Forum
7 posts
This guy has Mass hps. Conned dark blue dubious to Myself 57 Mage, 57 Warrior, 56 Druid. We decided to give him a shot and man does this guy have some hps. Ended up getting a rogue pet as the warrior kited him shooting arrows at him. Not one single spell landed and it took about 15mins of the warrior running and stopping only to get some arrows from myself. He dropped did give exp but no faction hit and dropped nothing at all. Not even a cp. Had no clue who he was but was interesting fight. My guess was this guy had easily over 10k hps. hit decent bout 130's on average. Leave him to the sk's and their epic i say.

Sorentino
57 Magician
▲ Page top
His loc
QuoteReply
# Nov 29 2001 at 6:37 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
He is located to left of dock, when you are facing lake. Up on a small hill. Cons indifferant to all sorts of races/dieties. Aghast 16 SHD on Vazaelle

__DEL__1630282858106
Scholar
83 posts
Cons dubiously to me, Darkelven Necromantress, worshipping Innoruuk.
Seems to be an SK, has an skeleton pet which is light blue to me at level 36 :)
He is not on one of the Erudin factions. nor Paineel faction. Does anyone has a clue what faction he is on?

▲ Page top
Where is he?
QuoteReply
# Nov 09 2001 at 2:46 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Where can I find this guy? I've read that he is at the docks, but, I didn't see him. Is he a timed spawn? If so, what is the time?
▲ Page top
SK Quest NPC
QuoteReply
# Oct 18 2001 at 1:45 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
He is an SK Epic Quest NPC part of a chain of errands into the hole... If you bring him a note from the previous guy in quest he gives you a case and you go hit the hole with a couple groups 55+ to take out a couple folks in the jail. I may have this a bit out of step as I am not up to this NPC on my Epic yet.

Tirnan AZmeji
51 SK Smurf of Badness
"Hey Fright.... bite me"
▲ Page top
Wide level range
QuoteReply
# Aug 26 2001 at 6:53 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
He must have a huge range of levels. He and his pet were green and indifferent to me (pets always are), 45 Paladin. When I hailed him se said "Ah, you do not possess the heart of an innocent. Be gone with you!"
He either knows me real well or I didn't hold what he needed - faction or certain item maybe?

con

# Jun 03 2001 at 2:29 PM Rating: Default

He is even to me a 50 paladin. so his lvl is 50 and hes magic resistant.

Yello at 48 here, apprehensive to this wizzy, have amilable with the erudin, and indiff with panieel.

Magic Resistant
QuoteReply
# Oct 23 2000 at 9:06 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
A mixed group from level 35 to 53 took him on. Due to his 100% magic resistance we got our hides tanned. Beware! no spells worked on him at all.

very strange
QuoteReply
# Oct 10 2000 at 12:51 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
He cons a solid red to me, looks at me dubiously (I'm a paladin too like the previous poster), but doesn't interfere when I kill Elial Brook and his pet very close by.

Does anyone have a clue what faction he's affiliated with? Judging from his pet, I'd say he's a Heretic, but he doesn't seem inclined to help his fellow Heretics.

Thunderhart
23rd season Paladin

# Oct 18 2000 at 3:46 PM Rating: Default

Anonymous
Strange. he is RED to me at 48...

since lvl 49 and 50 would be yellow to me, that must make him at least 51.
But the previous poster said he was blue to him at 51.

i am guessing he spawns in at various lvl ranges between 49 and 51.

Yvanhoe
